text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the NHK Mile C. nearly here, Agnes
Tachyon is once again diligently gathering data
on the other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still pondering how Agnes Tachyon's running
has changed, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She insists that I only worry about today's results
and exits the waiting room without offering any
explanation.
